query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `portfolios` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `portfolioData` text NOT NULL,
  `portfolioType` varchar(50),
  `isLive` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `liveStartDate` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `portfolios` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `portfolioData` text NOT NULL,
  `portfolioType` varchar(50),
  `isLive` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `liveStartDate` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updatedAt` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
